regional.title: Regional Settings
regional.subtitle: Set the timezone, currency, and date/number formatting used across your organization.

security.title: Security Settings
security.subtitle: Control authentication and session policy for your organization.
security.requireTwoFactorNote: Members must set up 2FA before they can access the organization.
security.sessionTimeoutNote: Automatically sign members out after this many minutes of inactivity. Use 0 to never expire.
security.allowedDomainsNote: Comma-separated list of email domains allowed to join. Leave empty to allow any domain.
